demo.title: checkr.sh
demo.code:
# What's spiking on Base right now? ($0.05)
bankr prompt "Use checkr /v1/spikes to show tokens with velocity > 3"

# Top tokens by attention share ($0.02)
bankr prompt "Get checkr leaderboard, top 10 by ATT_pct"

# Deep dive on a single token ($0.50)
bankr prompt "Run checkr /v1/token/BNKR — give me ATT deltas, divergence, narrative"

# Bankr agent ecosystem leaderboard ($0.02)
bankr prompt "Pull checkr /v1/bankr and show the top 5 agent tokens"

setup: No install required — every endpoint is plain HTTP behind x402
Python: `pip install x402` — TypeScript: `npm install x402-axios`
Fund a Base wallet with USDC plus ~$0.01 ETH for gas
Read the response: check `data_age_minutes` before acting on any signal
